hero.heading: While the world shakes, your business stays standing.
hero.body: Oil markets in chaos. Trade wars reshaping economies. Whatever happens out there — Ortho'M8 keeps your business capital protected, automatically, around the clock.

performance.heading:
Three reasons why nothing can touch
your capital.

cards.title: Built for a Turbulent World
cards.description: We trade synthetic indices on Deriv — a regulated platform where oil prices, interest rate decisions, and geopolitical shocks don't move the market. Your capital is completely shielded from the headlines.

cards.title: Your Hedge Runs Itself
cards.description: When your real-world assets take a hit, our system has already positioned a counter-trade to cover it. No phone calls. No waiting. No panic. The recovery is built in before the loss even registers.

cards.title: Decisions Made by Data, Not Fear
cards.description: No gut feelings. No rushed decisions at 3am. Our system only acts when all 11 independent safety checks pass simultaneously. If there's any doubt at all — we stay out.

results.eyebrow: Don't Take Our Word For It
results.heading:
The numbers are public.
The results are real.
results.body: Every trade we have ever made is documented and independently verifiable. No smoke. No mirrors. Just a transparent track record you can review before you make any decision.

final_cta.heading:
Stop hoping the market is kind to you.
Start knowing you're protected.
